title: 気まぐれオトメのゴルシちゃん☆

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Whassat? What'chu talkin' about?! Golshi's full go, anytime, all the time!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But you gotta meet me halfway, catch my drift?
None of that boring, half-baked training, yo!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Don't even think about subjecting me to a snooze
fest today.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
If you try it, we'll go white-water rafting instead,
and you're gonna be the raft!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I value my life too much, so I curate today's
training schedule entirely around Gold Ship's
demands.
